meta.name: Alex Rivera
meta.tagline: I build immersive, high-performance web experiences that feel alive.

headline: Crafting
digital
experiences
hero.intro: Full-stack engineer specializing in performant front-ends, real-time systems, and 3D web. I turn ambitious ideas into pixel-perfect, buttery-smooth realities.

about.heading: About
about.lead: I'm a software developer who lives at the intersection of engineering and design.
paragraphs: For the past 6+ years I've shipped products used by millions — from real-time collaboration tools to data-heavy dashboards and interactive 3D web experiences. I care deeply about the details: the easing curve of an animation, the 60fps scroll, the millisecond shaved off a load time.

I work end-to-end: architecting scalable back-ends, sculpting delightful front-ends, and obsessing over the seams in between. When I'm not coding, I'm exploring generative art, contributing to open source, and mentoring junior devs.

experience.summary: Lead front-end architect for a real-time analytics platform serving 5M+ daily users.
highlights: Rebuilt the rendering pipeline, cutting time-to-interactive by 62%
Designed a WebGL data-visualization engine handling 1M+ points at 60fps
Mentored a team of 6 engineers and led the design-system initiative

experience.summary: Built interactive marketing sites and product experiences for Fortune-500 clients.
highlights: Created a reusable Three.js component library adopted company-wide
Drove Core Web Vitals to green across the entire client portfolio

experience.summary: Crafted pixel-perfect interfaces and design systems for early-stage startups.
highlights: Built the company's first component library and Storybook docs
Reduced bundle size by 45% through code-splitting and tree-shaking
Collaborated with designers to ship 30+ production features

experience.summary: Where it all began — building websites and apps for small businesses and creators.
highlights: Delivered 15+ client projects from concept to launch
Learned to wear every hat: design, dev, deploy, and support
Fell in love with the craft of front-end engineering

projects.title: Helios Dashboard
projects.description: A real-time analytics dashboard rendering millions of data points with a custom WebGL engine. Buttery 60fps interactions at any scale.

projects.title: Lumen
projects.description: An immersive product showcase built with Three.js — interactive 3D models, physically-based materials, and cinematic scroll-driven storytelling.

projects.title: Pulse Chat
projects.description: A real-time collaboration platform with sub-100ms latency, presence, and CRDT-based conflict-free editing for thousands of concurrent users.

projects.title: Verdant
projects.description: A themeable, accessible component library with 80+ primitives, full keyboard support, and zero-runtime styling. Adopted across 4 product teams.

projects.title: Cosmos
projects.description: A generative art playground that turns audio into living particle galaxies using the Web Audio API and instanced GPU rendering.

projects.title: Drift
projects.description: A meditation and focus app with fluid gesture-driven navigation, offline-first sync, and a custom animation runtime for 120fps transitions.

contact.heading: Let's build something extraordinary
contact.subheading: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? My inbox is always open.
